questions.question: Paul says the entire law is fulfilled in one command. Which one?
Which of these is NOT listed as a fruit of the Spirit?
Paul says if you are led by the Spirit, you are not under the law.
For _____ you were called to freedom, brothers. Only don't use your freedom as an opportunity for the flesh.
The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and _____.
